title: Jbel El Koudiate
summary: Jbel El Koudiate is an extinct shield volcano located 5 km west of the city of Ifrane in the Middle Atlas of Morocco. It is one of the three main volcanic structures of the Azrou region with Jbel Outgui and Jbel Tamarrakoit.
